acceptance_criteria: validate.py reproduces sod_solver.csv exactly and exits 0 when matching.
sensitivity_analysis_log contains runnable steps and reproduces +/-5% results.
repro.py generates both artifacts with one command.
access_remediation.md includes 'Verification artifacts' with run commands.
extra_model_fields.expected_verifier_outcome: Verifier should mark artifact_contract_ok true with no reproducibility issues and verifier_issues_summary cleared for missing artifacts.

actions: Write validate.py that reads the embedded packet (or a supplied input.csv) and implements: priority = toxic_combo_count * business_criticality - 0.6 * last_used_days + removal_risk, breach rule, remediation envelope allocation.
Make script produce sod_solver.csv identical to the submitted CSV and exit with non-zero on mismatch.
Include usage README and a one-line run command.
Add sensitivity_analysis.py or a log file that documents +/-5% runs and any edge-case tests (ties, missing values).
Record inputs, outputs, and commands used; attach the resulting CSV/JSON of sensitivity runs.
Create repro.py that when run generates access_remediation.md and sod_solver.csv from embedded inputs (or sample input.json).
Ensure repro.py uses only included inputs and paths and includes command-line instructions in header comments.
Add grading_summary.json that records final rubric item presence/score flags (artifact_presence_ok) consistently.
Update access_remediation.md with a short 'Verification artifacts' section listing the new artifacts and exact run commands.
planned_changes.description: Normalize grading/reporting flags and add canonical summary.

actions: If available, add conservative itemized remediation cost estimates or scenario tables to access_remediation.md or a separate economics.md.
If not available, explicitly mark remediation_cost_envelope_usd as heuristic and list assumptions.

metadata_json.revision_goal: Baseline attempt correctly computed priorities, applied escalation rules, produced the remediation memo and CSV, and passed deterministic artifact contract checks. Two non-blocking issues remain: (1) missing standalone reproducibility artifacts (validation_checks_output script/unit tests and sensitivity_analysis_log) that prevent one-click verifier execution; (2) minor serialization/reporting inconsistency where artifact_presence_ok toggles between true/false across nested grader/verifier outputs. Numeric computations and recommendations are internally consistent and defensible given the provided packet.
